languages.text: {n}Предок усмехается. Звук неприятно клокочет в его железном горле.{/n} "Ваши действия говорят о воле к жизни и рвении, свойственным всем членам рода фон Валанциус. Следите, чтобы эти качества не привели вас к краху, как привели меня... наследни{mf|к|ца}". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

traits.locale_text: {n}Предок вновь смеется. Звук неприятно клокочет в его железном горле.{/n} "Ваши действия говорят о воле к жизни и рвении, свойственным всем членам рода фон Валанциус. Следите, чтобы эти качества не привели вас к краху, как привели меня... наследни{mf|к|ца}". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

languages.text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

Следите, чтобы эти качества не привели вас к краху, как привели меня... наследни{mf|к|ца}". {n}Себериан вдруг пошатывается, однако усилием воли удерживается на ногах. {/n} "А теперь мне нужен отдых".

Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

languages.text: {n}Tu antepasado se ríe. El sonido que resuena en su garganta de hierro es desagradable.{/n} «Sus acciones muestran la voluntad de supervivencia y el fervor típicos del linaje von Valancius. Asegúrese de que esas cualidades no acarrean su ruina como hicieron conmigo... hereder{mf|o mío|a mía}». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu antepasado se ríe. El sonido que resuena en su garganta de hierro es desagradable.{/n} «Sus acciones muestran la voluntad de supervivencia y el fervor típicos del linaje von Valancius. Asegúrese de que esas cualidades no acarrean su ruina como hicieron conmigo... hereder{mf|o mío|a mía}». {n}Seberian se tambalea, pero consigue mantenerse en pie gracias a su fuerza de voluntad.{/n} «Y ahora, necesito descansar».

languages.text: {n}你的先祖大笑起来，笑声在他那铁铸的喉咙里震荡，听上去很是刺耳。{/n}“你的所作所为透露出一种求生意志，以及冯·瓦兰修斯血脉中共有的那股狂热。小心别让这些特质将你引向毁灭，就像我当年一样……我的继承人。{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的先祖大笑起来，笑声在他那铁铸的喉咙里震荡，听上去很是刺耳。{/n}“你的所作所为透露出一种求生意志，以及冯·瓦兰修斯血脉中共有的那股狂热。小心别让这些特质将你引向毁灭，就像我当年一样……我的继承人。{n}塞贝里安突然踉跄了一下，却靠意志力强行站稳了身体。{/n}“现在，我需要休息。”

languages.text: {n}Votre ancêtre éclate à nouveau d'un rire rauque dont le grasseyement résonne de façon déplaisante dans sa gorge métallique.{/n} « Vos agissements témoignent d'une volonté de survivre et d'une ferveur communes à tous les membres de la lignée von Valancius. Prenez garde que ces qualités ne vous mènent pas à la ruine comme votre aïeul ici présent... {mf|héritier|héritière}. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre ancêtre éclate à nouveau d'un rire rauque dont le grasseyement résonne de façon déplaisante dans sa gorge métallique.{/n} « Vos agissements témoignent d'une volonté de survivre et d'une ferveur communes à tous les membres de la lignée von Valancius. Prenez garde que ces qualités ne vous mènent pas à la ruine comme votre aïeul ici présent... {mf|héritier|héritière}. » {n}Subitement pris de vertige, Seberian parvient néanmoins à rester debout par la seule force de sa volonté.{/n} « Sur ce, j'ai besoin de repos. »

languages.text: {n}Atan bir kahkaha koparıyor. Ses, demir boğazında nahoş bir tıkırtı çıkarıyor.{/n} "Eylemlerin, von Valancius soyunun tüm mensuplarında ortak olan bir hayatta kalma arzusu ve coşkusu gösteriyor. Dikkat et de bu nitelikler bana yaptıkları gibi seni de felakete sürüklemesin... Vârisim." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}Atan bir kahkaha koparıyor. Ses, demir boğazında nahoş bir tıkırtı çıkarıyor.{/n} "Eylemlerin, von Valancius soyunun tüm mensuplarında ortak olan bir hayatta kalma arzusu ve coşkusu gösteriyor. Dikkat et de bu nitelikler bana yaptıkları gibi seni de felakete sürüklemesin... Vârisim." {n}Aniden sendeleyen Seberian, saf iradesiyle kendini dik durmaya zorluyor.{/n} "Şimdi... Dinlenmem gerek."

languages.text: {n}祖先が笑い声を上げた。その音は鉄の喉の中で不快に響く。{/n}「君が取る行動は、生き残る意志とフォン・ヴァランシウス家の全員に共通する熱意を示している。この二つの資質が君を滅ぼすことを、私は望まない。君も、私と同じように、この二つの資質に導かれて滅びるな。」 {n}セベリアンは突然よろめきながらも、不屈の意志で立ち直った。{/n} 「そして、今は、私は休息が必要だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a laugh. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir of mine." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

traits.locale_text: {n}祖先が笑い声を上げた。その音は鉄の喉の中で不快に響く。{/n}「君が取る行動は、生き残る意志とフォン・ヴァランシウス家の全員に共通する熱意を示している。この二つの資質が君を滅ぼすことを、私は望まない。君も、私と同じように、この二つの資質に導かれて滅びるな。」 {n}セベリアンは突然よろめきながらも、不屈の意志で立ち直った。{/n} 「そして、今は、私は休息が必要だ。」

languages.text: {n}Dein Ahnherr lacht erneut. Sein Lachen erzeugt ein unangenehmes Rasseln in seiner eisernen Kehle.{/n} "Eure Taten deuten auf Euren Überlebenswillen und eine Begeisterung hin, die allen Mitgliedern des Hauses von Valancius eigen ist. Passt auf, dass Euch diese Eigenschaften nicht auch in den Abgrund führen ... {mf|Erbe|Erbin}." {n}Plötzlich wankt Seberian, zwingt sich aber mit schierer Willenskraft, aufrecht stehen zu bleiben.{/n} "Und nun brauche ich Ruhe."
languages.original_text: { n}The ancestor laughs again. The sound rattles unpleasantly within his iron throat.{/n} "Your actions speak of a will to survive and a fervour common to all members of the von Valancius line. Take care that these qualities do not lead you to ruin, as they did me... heir." {n}Seberian suddenly staggers, yet forces himself to remain upright through sheer will.{/n} "And now, I require rest."

Passt auf, dass Euch diese Eigenschaften nicht auch in den Abgrund führen ... {mf|Erbe|Erbin} {n}Plötzlich wankt Seberian, zwingt sich aber mit schierer Willenskraft, aufrecht stehen zu bleiben.{/n} "Und nun brauche ich Ruhe."
